name: Desktop Automation Playbook
description: Current operating guide for Prometheus desktop automation on Windows. Covers screenshot-first execution, window targeting, UI Automation, precise clicking, scrolling, typing, verification, macros, and when to use desktop tools versus browser or shell tools.

resources.description: Observed 2026-05-12 guardrail for non-disruptive/background desktop sandbox preflight and runtime-dependent desktop tools.
Guardrail for desktop-auth workflows where Raul explicitly needs his existing Chrome profile/window rather than browser automation's isolated profile.
Recovery guardrail for stale screenshot IDs and likely-noop loops during desktop_scroll workflows.
